subcodes.first_line: O my God, I exalt Thee above all praise and glorification, and I sanctify Thee, O my Master, above every description in the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انزهک یا الهی عن کل نعت و ثناٌ و اقدسک یا مولائی عن کل وصف فی عالم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
